name: goodjob
description: Internal recognition & rewards – pnpm workspace (frontend + backend)

scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d --wait postgres redis minio
scripts.infra:down: docker compose stop postgres redis minio
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "pnpm --filter backend start:dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter backend build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter backend lint
